Headline: #72 North Temporary Eastbound Reroute near North Ave./Kolmar
ShortDescription: EB 72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Cicero, Grand, North Avenue and over regular route, due to street blockage near North Ave./Kolmar.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Cicero, Grand, North Avenue and over regular route, due to street blockage near North Ave./Kolmar.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #28 Stony Island Temporary Southbound Reroute near 47th/Lake Park
ShortDescription: Southbound 28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted via 47th, Woodlawn, 51st, Lake Park and over normal route, due to street blockage near 47th/Lake Park.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted via 47th, Woodlawn, 51st, Lake Park and over the normal route, due to street blockage near 47th/Lake Park.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #3 King Drive Temporary Reroute near King Drive / 71st
ShortDescription: 3 King Drive buses temp. rrtd NB: King Drive, 75th, 71st & King Drive; SB: King Drive, Lafayette, 71st & King Drive, due to police activity at King Drive / 71st

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near King Drive / 71st, due to police activity near King Drive / 71st.

Northbound buses will operate via King Drive, 75th, 71st and King Drive

Southbound buses will operate via King Drive, Lafayette, 71st and King Drive

Allow extra travel time.
